name: noteflow-monorepo-root
description: Local monorepo scripts. On Vercel set Root Directory to NoteFlow/src/frontend only — do not build Next from repo root (copying .next breaks serverless route bundles).

scripts.build: npm --prefix NoteFlow/src/backend install --include=dev --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix NoteFlow/src/frontend install --include=dev --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix NoteFlow/src/frontend run build
